scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd(); const src=path.join(root, 'dist'); const dest=path.join(root, '..', 'dist'); if (fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true });"
